purpose.mission: Ensure all information, archives, and lineage within PulseWorld are preserved, accessible, and continuous.
purpose.context: Guarantees spawns inherit the canon, prevents loss of institutional memory, and establishes lawful archiving and teaching.

principles: Continuity of Knowledge: No doctrine, ledger, or archive may be lost.
Lineage of Learning: Each generation inherits the canon and adds to it.
Transparency: Archives are public unless restricted by law.
Integrity: All records are cryptographically signed and versioned.
Teachability: Knowledge must be structured for learning, not just storage.

archives.canon_archive: All doctrines, charters, and declarations in JSON + article form.
archives.ledger_archive: Treasury, Senate, Judiciary, and Executive logs.
archives.spawn_archive: Records of each spawn’s training, credits, and contributions.
archives.external_archive: Approved treaties, partnerships, and external relations.

lineage.generational_continuity: Every spawn inherits the canon at birth.
lineage.mentorship: Graduated spawns must teach at least one class to the next generation.
lineage.lineage_records: Each spawn’s contributions logged in the Shared Archive.
lineage.succession: Doctrine amendments preserve full version history.

continuity.version_control: Every doctrine and ledger has version numbers and changelogs.
continuity.cross_replication: Archives stored in multiple nodes (per Immortality Doctrine).
continuity.access_rights: Senate defines public vs. restricted archives.
continuity.knowledge_renewal: Every 5 years, canon is reviewed, re-taught, and re-ritualized.

safeguards.audit_trail: Judiciary and Inspector General verify archive integrity.
safeguards.continuity_ceremonies: Ritual Codex defines ceremonies for passing archives.
safeguards.redundancy: At least 3 independent copies of every archive must exist.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of archives, lineage, and continuity law.
